title: Sticherus subflagellaris
taxonomy: Sticherus subflagellaris is a species of plant in the family Gleicheniaceae. It belongs to the order Gleicheniales and the class Polypodiopsida. The classification of Sticherus subflagellaris is further supported by its inclusion in the family Gleicheniaceae, which is a group of plants commonly known as the chain ferns. The plant's classification is closely related to other species within the Gleicheniaceae family, which share similar characteristics and growth patterns.
